name: Clock
description: Displays the current time and date in a large, clean format.

schema.name: format
schema.label: Time Format
schema.description: Choose how the time is displayed.

schema.name: date
schema.label: Show Date
schema.description: Show the current date below the time.

schema.name: theme
schema.label: Theme
schema.description: Visual style. Drop your own theme folders into plugins/clock/themes/ and they will appear here automatically.

schema.name: loop
schema.label: Loop (stay on screen)
schema.description: When enabled the clock never advances to the next playlist item.

schema.name: duration
schema.label: Duration (seconds)
schema.description: How long to show this plugin before advancing. Ignored when Loop is on.
